ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data recording */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the data collection point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the data collection point */,
  "x_water" REAL /* Water quality metric (x-axis) */,
  "y_water" REAL /* Water quality metric (y-axis) */,
  "x_wind" REAL /* Wind speed/direction metric (x-axis) */,
  "y_wind" REAL /* Wind speed/direction metric (y-axis) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data has been validated */,
  "validation_threshold" REAL /* Threshold used for data validation */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Current status of the site */,
  "site_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water quality metric entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding data entry */,
  "x_water" REAL /* Water quality metric (x-axis) */,
  "y_water" REAL /* Water quality metric (y-axis) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of water quality metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_metrics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_metrics" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind metric entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding data entry */,
  "x_wind" REAL /* Wind speed/direction metric (x-axis) */,
  "y_wind" REAL /* Wind speed/direction metric (y-axis) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of wind metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_metrics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
